checks.description: Auto-merge enabled with no approval gate
checks.reason: Auto-merge without required reviews allows agent-authored PRs to merge without human inspection.
checks.fix: Add required-reviewers: 1 (minimum) or a status check gate before auto-merge triggers.

checks.description: Workflow triggers on pull_request_target with checkout of PR head
checks.reason: pull_request_target + PR head checkout gives untrusted code access to repo secrets.
checks.fix: Use pull_request (not target) for untrusted contributor workflows, or add explicit trust checks.

checks.description: workflow_dispatch or push to main triggers immediate deploy with no approval
checks.reason: Auto-deploy on push to main bypasses manual verification of what is being deployed.
checks.fix: Add an environment protection rule in GitHub Settings requiring manual approval before deploy.

checks.description: secrets printed or echoed in workflow step
checks.reason: Echoing secrets writes them to the workflow log where they can be extracted.
checks.fix: Never echo secret values. Use them only as direct environment variable references.

checks.description: Workflow uses curl|bash or wget|sh for install step
checks.reason: Pipe-to-shell installs in CI can be poisoned by CDN compromise or URL hijacking.
checks.fix: Download, verify SHA256 hash, then execute. Use official actions (actions/setup-*) where possible.

checks.description: Third-party action used without pinned SHA — uses tag or branch
checks.reason: Tag-pinned actions can be silently changed by the action author (tag mutable).
checks.fix: Pin actions to a full commit SHA: uses: actions/checkout@a5ac7e51b41094c92402da3b24376905380afc29

checks.description: permissions block missing — workflow inherits maximum token permissions
checks.reason: Workflows without explicit permissions inherit write access to contents, PRs, and packages.
checks.fix: Add 'permissions: read-all' at the top level and grant specific write permissions only where needed.

checks.description: npm publish or pip publish triggered automatically without manual gate
checks.reason: Automatic package publishing on CI trigger means a compromised commit can publish to registries.
checks.fix: Gate publish steps behind a GitHub environment with required reviewers.

checks.description: Self-hosted runner used — runner environment is not isolated by GitHub
checks.reason: Self-hosted runners persist state between runs. A compromised job can poison subsequent jobs.
checks.fix: Ensure self-hosted runners are ephemeral (fresh VM per job). Document runner hardening.

checks.description: No timeout-minutes set on jobs — runaway jobs waste credits indefinitely
checks.reason: Jobs without a timeout can run for 6 hours (GitHub default), burning minutes on hung processes.
checks.fix: Add timeout-minutes: 30 (or an appropriate value) to each job definition.
